what_was_done: SurrealDB migration Tasks 1-6+12 of 16 done. SDK installed+verified (RecordID not RecordId, no signin for embedded, flat response format). surreal_collection.py built (CRUD+vector+BM25+where, 21 tests). All 6 table schemas defined. Data migrated (5311 knowledge, 955 fix_outcomes, 4104 observations, 88 web_pages, 2 quarantine, 1748 clusters, 617 KG edges; 100% top-5 search quality overlap). memory_server.py init rewired from LanceDB to SurrealDB. 12 maintenance scripts archived.
